title: back to school 📂 productive days in my life as a college student: studying & what i eat
description:
Hello Friends!

surprise!! happy friday 🍀✨🧿

going back to school this month has been sososo busy, this vlog is a bit of week 1&2 (: its also a bit more of a slice of life since i am still settling into routine and organzing my loft. but study vlog coming up next 🤭

i love you x 1.31M!! ❤️
xo, bre
